arts.ttl: Ex-Newcastle United star and World Cup winner George Eastham dies aged 88
arts.sum: “The Stoke City family is immensely saddened by the passing of club legend George Eastham OBE at the age of 88,” a statement read. "George was signed by the Potters for a £35,000 fee shortly after being part of England’s 1966 World Cup-winning squad.

arts.ttl: I snubbed Newcastle United because it rains a lot but my career has gone downhill ever since
arts.sum: “My agent told me that there was a proposal from Villarreal and Newcastle, but I saw on the internet that it was raining a lot there and I said no. When Newcastle's interest became apparent, Semedo had a quick Google search, saw the amount of rain in the UK and instead opted to move to La Liga side Villarreal instead.

arts.ttl: Chris Dobey's relationship with Alan Shearer after Newcastle icon's text to darts star
arts.sum: The devoted Newcastle United fan couldn't contain his joy upon receiving a text from the Magpies icon after his Masters victory in 2023, an achievement that also landed him a spot in that year's Premier League. He told to Sky Sports: "It was great to get a text from Alan Shearer on the Monday morning.

arts.ttl: West Ham chief put right on 'very unclear' Newcastle United situation as minister apologises
arts.sum: West Ham vice-chairman Karren Brady has claimed it is a 'very unclear' situation - but Saudi Arabia's Crown Prince would only have to undergo the independent football regulator's test if there were 'grounds for concern'.
